MaxLineLength:AiLandPlayOrderTest.kt$AiLandPlayOrderTest$val actionTypeDetail = checkNotNull(userAction.detailsList.firstOrNull { it.key == "actionType" }) { "UserActionTaken should have actionType detail" }

MaxLineLength:CardInjectionTest.kt$CardInjectionTest$val handZone = checkNotNull(gsm.zonesList.firstOrNull { it.type == wotc.mtgo.gre.external.messaging.Messages.ZoneType.Hand && it.ownerSeatId == 1 }) { "Hand zone should exist for seat 1" }
